purpose: Reusable payload for turning a Sonic-Forage GitHub issue, PR review, or agent task into a bounded open-source framework contribution.

task_envelope.requested_change: Add or improve one public-safe prompt, payload, tag dictionary, UI block, workflow contract, or source-backed guide section.

blocked_without_approval: opening or editing issues at scale
uploading private media or private datasets
printing real endpoint URLs or tokens
operator_inputs_required_before_external: confirmation that no private scene details or secrets are included
dry_run_agent_prompt: You are improving the Sonic-Forage open-source builder framework. Make exactly one public-safe repo-local contribution, keep all endpoint URLs as env var placeholders, leave external launch gates closed, run scripts/verify.py and scripts/verify_framework.py, and map every claim to a repo path or public URL.
expected_success_highlights: endpoint switchboard risky flags remain false
GitHub builder payload contains closed flags and blocked action list
no secret-looking markers in framework docs or payload examples
